narrative:
Week 5 Situation Report — CHW Copilot Syndromic Surveillance

ALERT: Respiratory fever cases at Kibera Health Post (loc_01) have surged to 12, 3.2x above the 4-week baseline mean of 3.75. This exceeds the alert threshold and warrants immediate investigation.

Acute watery diarrhea remains within normal range across all locations.

Recommended actions:
1. Deploy additional CHWs to loc_01 for active case finding
2. Ensure respiratory infection treatment supplies at loc_01 health center
3. Investigate potential common exposure source
4. Continue monitoring loc_02 for spillover
